checks.label: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX: reputation_changed emits actual_delta = new_val - old_rep
checks.evidence: ADD_REPUTATION handler in _apply_effect(): old_rep captured BEFORE _apply_faction_reputation() call (line 596). actual_delta = new_val - old_rep computed after (line 599). reputation_changed.emit(faction, new_val, actual_delta) uses actual_delta not raw rep_delta (line 600).
checks.test_scenario: faction_rep=95, raw_delta=+20 → _apply_faction_reputation clamps to 100 → new_val=100 → actual_delta=100-95=+5 (not +20). Signal correctly emits +5.

checks.label: CARDS_PER_DAY constant exists in merlin_constants.gd
checks.evidence: grep 'CARDS_PER_DAY' found 0 results. S2-DAY-TICK-FIX not yet applied.

checks.label: resolve_choice() increments run['day'] every CARDS_PER_DAY cards
checks.evidence: resolve_choice() increments cards_played (line 146) but NO run['day'] increment logic present. Day counter is initialized to 1 in init_run() (line 19) but never ticked. LLM context will always show 'Jour 1' for entire run.

checks.label: LLM context day field changes over a simulated 30-card run
checks.evidence: Depends on CHECK-3. run['day'] never incremented → day stays 1 regardless of cards played.

checks.label: REGRESSION: faction_rep reads meta.faction_rep (not stale run.factions)
checks.evidence: ADD_REPUTATION reads state['meta']['faction_rep'][faction]. Stale run.factions not used in effect application path.

checks.label: REGRESSION: active_promises uses run.active_promises (unified key)
checks.evidence: check_promise_deadlines() reads run.get('active_promises', []). No split-brain with run.promises key.

checks.label: REGRESSION: drain=0 (no life drain per card in resolve_choice)
checks.evidence: resolve_choice() does not call apply_effect_func with DAMAGE_LIFE at start. No drain logic present. Director q-20260412-001 applied correctly.

checks.label: REGRESSION: no pacing_recovery (+5HP if life<20)
checks.evidence: resolve_choice() contains no HEAL_LIFE or pacing recovery call. Removed per Director q-20260412-005.

checks.label: REGRESSION: story_log sliced to last 2 entries (awaiting RAG upgrade)
checks.evidence: story_log.slice(-2) applied after append. Consistent with current behaviour, pending S3-STORY-LOG-RAG.

regressions_vs_prev_reports.check: dominant_faction routing wired (StoreFactions.build_and_store_faction_context called in init_run)

low_notes.label: mg_meditation dead preload + TAG_FIELD_MAP entry still present
low_notes.note: Director q-20260413-004 answered 'Delete mg_meditation'. S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP task now unblocked and should clean these in next DEV cycle.

summary: PARTIAL_PASS 6/9. BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX fully verified: actual_delta emitted correctly, faction_rep=95+delta=+20 → signal emits +5. 5/5 prior regressions PASS. 3/9 FAIL_PENDING all blocked on S2-DAY-TICK-FIX (P8): CARDS_PER_DAY constant missing, run.day never incremented in resolve_choice. Day counter frozen at 1 for entire run. S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP unblocked by q-20260413-004 answer.
